gold.assessment: Gold at extreme highs with real yields near 2% threshold creating significant opportunity cost despite elevated VIX.

silver.assessment: Silver at historically extreme levels despite fair gold/silver ratio, vulnerable to momentum reversal.

copper.assessment: Copper significantly elevated above $5.00 threshold despite strong GDP growth, pricing in too much optimism.

real_rates.assessment: Real yields near critical 2% threshold where gold faces significant headwinds from opportunity cost.

macro_drivers.assessment: Macro environment shows growth momentum but restrictive Fed policy keeping real rates elevated.

bull_case: Continued strong GDP growth supports industrial metals demand while elevated VIX maintains safe-haven bid. Green transition accelerating copper demand fundamentals despite high prices.
bear_case: All metals at extreme valuations with gold facing 2% real yield threshold headwind. Risk-off environment insufficient to justify current precious metal premiums with restrictive Fed policy.
brief_for_cio: SELL metals complex. Gold at $5138 faces critical real yield headwind near 2%. Silver/copper both extremely elevated. Recommend tactical shorts via DUST/JDST. Risk-reward heavily favors bears.
